zh.Ilmer, Buckinghamshire, England: 英國巴金哈姆爾易爾莫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Jarpenville於大約1179年出生在英國賀特福爾布時，她的父親William Jarpenville25歲，母親Aubrea Rumenel22歲。她於1208年之前與Thomas FitzBernard III在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1254年12月11日在英國肯特迪亞爾享年76歲，埋葬在英國肯特坎特布瑞。

zh-hans.Ilmer, Buckinghamshire, England: 英国巴金哈姆爾易爾莫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Jarpenville于大约1179年出生在英国賀特福爾布时，她的父亲William Jarpenville25岁，母亲Aubrea Rumenel22岁。她于1208年之前与Thomas FitzBernard III在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1254年12月11日在英国肯特迪亞爾享年76岁，埋葬在英国肯特坎特布瑞。

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Jarpenville was born about 1179, in Bushey, Hertfordshire, England, her father, William Jarpenville, was 25 and her mother, Aubrea Rumenel, was 22. She married Thomas FitzBernard III before 1208, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 11 December 1254, in Deal, Kent, England, at the age of 76, and was buried in Canterbury, Kent, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Jarpenville est née environ 1179, à Bushey, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, William Jarpenville, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Aubrea Rumenel, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas FitzBernard III avant 1208, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 11 décembre 1254, à Deal, Kent, Angleterre, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterrée à Canterbury, Kent, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Jarpenville um 1179 in Bushey, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Jarpenville 25 und ihre Mutter Aubrea Rumenel 22. Sie hat vor 1208 in England Thomas FitzBernard III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 11. Dezember 1254 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Deal, Kent, England und wurde in Canterbury, Kent, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Jarpenville è nata il circa 1179 nel Bushey, Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, William Jarpenville, aveva 25 anni e sua madre, Aubrea Rumenel, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Thomas FitzBernard III prima del 1208, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 11 dicembre 1254, nel Deal, Kent, England, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolta a Canterbury, Kent, England.

ja.Bushey, Hertfordshire, England: イギリスハートフォードシュアイアブシー
ja.lifeSummary: Alice Jarpenvilleが約1179年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアブシーで生まれた時，父William Jarpenvilleは25歳，母Aubrea Rumenelは22歳であった。1208年以前にイギリスでThomas FitzBernard IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1254年12月11日にイギリスケントディールで76歳で死去し，イギリスケントカンテルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Jarpenville(이)가 대략 1179년 영국 허트퍼드실르 부셰이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Jarpenville(은)는 25세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Aubrea Rumenel(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1208년 이전 영국에서 Thomas FitzBernard III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1254년 12월 11일 영국 켄트 디에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 켄트 캉르버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Jarpenville nasceu aproximadamente 1179, em Bushey, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Jarpenville, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Aubrea Rumenel, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas FitzBernard III antes 1208, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1254, em Deal, Kent, Inglaterra, com 76 anos, e foi sepultada em Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Jarpenville родилась около 1179 г. в местности буши, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Jarpenville было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Aubrea Rumenel, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas FitzBernard III перед 1208 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 11 декабря 1254 г. в местности диль, кэнт, Англия в возрасте 76 лет и была похоронена в местности кантирбури, кэнт, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Jarpenville nació aproximadamente 1179, en Bushey, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Jarpenville, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Aubrea Rumenel, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Thomas FitzBernard III antes de 1208, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 11 de diciembre de 1254, en Deal, Kent, Inglaterra, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultada en Canterbury, Kent, Inglaterra.
